lines.speaker: Darcor quo Narga
lines.text: Greetings human. I am Darcor quo Narga, a guardian for the Kahlith. Have you come to serve the balance?

lines.speaker: Darcor quo Narga
lines.text: Then you should speak to Konar quo Maten. She will guide you.

lines.speaker: Darcor quo Narga
lines.text: A shame. You are a bringer of death, you could be of great use to the balance.

lines.speaker: Darcor quo Narga
lines.text: Then you should speak with Xorrah quo Sihar. He will show you the way.
